prompt: Edit image 1, transforming the scene into a detailed 3D render. Replace the fish object with a 3D model of the smartphone from image 2, held by the hands. Render the entire scene in a stark black and white, high-contrast style inspired by image 3.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the entire scene into a detailed 3D render. Replace the fish object, which is centrally held by the hands, with a 3D model of the smartphone from image 2. Ensure the hands from image 1 maintain their current pose and realistically hold the new smartphone in the same central position. Apply a stark black and white, high-contrast visual style to the final rendered scene, inspired by the aesthetic of image 3.
objects: stark black and white visual style
